=== bd2001-04-18_boulder.txt
===================
===================
===================
Cd-Rs from trade (2001) --> EAC (secure mode) to FLAC --> TLH

Bob Dylan, 4/18/01, Boulder, CO, 2CDR

(78:29 min + 45:29 min), excellent sound

Probably the same as LB-1073, but have not detected the small drops on d1t2, d1t6, d1t7, between cdrs, d2t4 0:00 described in that. 

CD1
1 Roving Gambler (acoustic), 2 To Ramona (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin), 3 Desolation Row (acoustic), 4 To Be Alone With You (Larry on Fiddle), 5 Tears Of Rage (Bob on harp), 6 Things Have Changed, 7 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic), 8 Masters Of War (acoustic), 9 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) (Bob on harp), 10 Standing In The Doorway, 11 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp), 12 Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat, 

CD2
1 (1st encore), Love Sick, 2 Like A Rolling Stone, 3 If Dogs Run Free (acoustic) (Larry and Charlie on electric guitars), 4 All Along The Watchtower (Larry on steel guitar), 5 Girl Of The North Country (acoustic), 6 Highway 61 Revisited, 7 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 8 (2nd encore), Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 (Larry on steel guitar)
